ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot expressing 'no vacancy' using its arms.  The animation will start with both arms crossed firmly across the chest, indicating a definite 'no'. Then, the arms will shift slightly to emphasize the refusal, before returning to the initial crossed arms position. This creates a decisive, yet slightly animated, visual representation of the emoji. The use of both arms conveys a stronger sense of refusal than a single-arm gesture would. I will be checking examples for range of motion and ensuring the poses fit naturally with the robot's physical construction.

frames.beat: both arms cross firmly, a clear refusal
arms return to a firm cross, final decision
